cases.prompt: design.md 토큰으로 디자인 시스템 페이지 만들고 A4 브랜드 북 PDF로 뽑아줘.

assertions.text: Reads design.md and extracts color/type/spacing tokens, filling missing spacing/radius/shadow with the default ramp and flagging them
Writes a self-contained design-system.html (inline CSS + inline SVG, Google Fonts/Pretendard CDN, zero build)
Renders the A4 brand-book PDF via headless chromium --print-to-pdf

cases.prompt: Generate a style guide HTML catalog from our DESIGN.md.

assertions.text: Builds catalog sections: palette swatches, type scale, spacing/radius/shadow, component gallery, icon grid, do/don't
If no design.md/DESIGN.md source exists, stops and routes to simon-design-first instead of inventing tokens
